directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Computational slack measurement
directions_tried.outcome: 158-237× vortex stretching slack. Decomposition: 63% Lad + 31% geom + 6% sym.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3a: Spectral Ladyzhenskaya (DEAD END)
directions_tried.outcome: Spectral support can't prove tighter worst-case constant. Vector component factor only provable result.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3b: Literature survey
directions_tried.outcome: 28 papers. No spectral Lad in literature. Tao obstruction. CZ/BKM advantage.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3c: BKM advantage + intermittency
directions_tried.outcome: CZ near-tight (~3× with theoretical constant). BMO/L^∞=0.27. C(F₄)≈0.003/F₄.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3d: Adversarial review
directions_tried.outcome: 3 claims weakened, 1 error caught. Most defensible: Ladyzhenskaya dominance (63%) + quantified slack atlas.
